message:
feat(dashboard): replace simulated demo with real test-suite runner

Swap the hardcoded simulated event timeline with actual parity matrix,
performance showcase, and corruption recovery execution against real
fixtures. Integrate CommandPalette (Ctrl+K), LogViewer overlay (l key),
and NotificationQueue toast popups for mismatch/benchmark/recovery
events. Refactor input routing to support palette-first dispatch. Fix
unicode-unsafe string truncation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
